# CrewSignal

CrewSignal is a software platform that helps small service businesses, such as contractors, salons, and barbershops, automatically request Google reviews from their customers after a job is completed.

## What CrewSignal does
After a business marks a job complete in their existing CRM or booking software (currently Jobber or Square Appointments), CrewSignal automatically sends one text message to that customer with a thank-you and a link to leave a Google review. Businesses do not need to remember to ask, and customers are not contacted more than once per completed job.

## Who it's for
Field service contractors (roofing, HVAC, plumbing, fencing, decks) and appointment-based service businesses (salons, barbershops, studios) who want more Google reviews without manually following up with every customer.

## Key facts
- Works with: Jobber, Square Appointments
- One message sent per completed job, never repeated for the same job
- Every message includes a STOP opt-out instruction, honored permanently
- Pricing is tailored to business size and job volume; available on request via a demo
- Operated by Brandon Myles, Middle Tennessee, USA

## Pages
- Homepage and pricing: https://getcrewsignal.com/index.html

- SMS Terms (consent and messaging details): https://getcrewsignal.com/sms-terms.html
- Free Google Business Profile setup guide: https://getcrewsignal.com/google-setup-guide.html
